title: Fix intermittent storing to parameter variable error

features.name: package parameter passed to virtual class parameter
features.description: Code should include a package-level parameter passed to a parameterized virtual class parameter during instantiation

features.name: static function accessing virtual class parameter
features.description: Code should include a static function inside a parameterized virtual class that reads the class parameter

features.name: static method call via scope resolution operator
features.description: Code should include a static method of a parameterized virtual class called using the :: scope resolution operator

features.name: parameterized virtual class with static function
features.description: Code should include a parameterized virtual class containing a static function that uses the class parameter
